content:
# Fluid Loss Test

**Summary**: A test to determine the amount of fluid lost from a slurry under pressure.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] applied fluid loss tests to evaluate the effectiveness of nano-silica in controlling fluid outflow.

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] conducted fluid loss tests on cement slurries.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] conducted fluid loss tests on cement slurries.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The addition of nano-silice significantly reduced fluid loss compared to the base case. ([[2012-amer|Amer, 2012, p. 45]])

- Determined that fiber addition reduces free water and controls fluid loss. ([[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017, p. 17]])
